When it is about a vintage watch's authenticity, your watch's reference number will help you in finding out if its an original piece or a Frankenstein watch.

In Mainspring.dxb, before displaying a vintage watch, we check all the details on the behalf of you, ensure it is a 100% authentic watch, take the liability by issuing a store certificate, and provide 3 months warranty.

Visit us @The B1 Mall everyday 1:30-11:00PM or for shopping online click
www.mainspringdubai.com

#authentic #original #watch #vintage #vintagewatch

This weekend, we will be in three different locations.
Meet us and your dream watch this weekend!
www.mainspringdubai.com

#dubaiwatches #vintagewatch #vintage #dubaiwatchclub #dubaiwatch

Before buying a second-hand watch, ensure your watch's reference number matches with your watch, and secondly ensure your movement has been used by the manufacturer for your reference number. These two checks are not enough but are the main points of a verification..

At Mainspring, we make all the required and detailed inspections before we buy a watch to display in our store and present to our customers. 
We issue a store authenticity liability certificate with each watch we sell and also provide 3 months warranty.
Shop in confidence, buy authentic.
www.mainspringsubai.com
